name: BB:DeviceDefinition: Devices to Monitor for High Event Rates
notes: Defines devices in which you wish to monitor for high event rates.  The event rate threshold is controlled in the rule "Anomaly: Devices with High Event Rates"
bb_references: BB:DeviceDefinition: Devices to Monitor for High Event Rates on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Flow Classification Engine-5 :: acme21
TD_list: APPLY BB:DeviceDefinition: Devices to Monitor for High Event Rates on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Flow Classification Engine-5 :: acme21
